info.name: eLeave Core API
info.description: API for eLeave Core - Leave Management System

request.description: Get all active leave type entitlements
Get company list with year end verification
Get master data (department, designation, section, branch, bank, costcentre, country, employee_type, employee_status)

item.name: Get Report by Type and User

request.description: Get individual report (reporttype: leave-entitlement, approval-override, apply-on-behalf, entitlement-claim, leave-taken, leave-adjustment, leave-cancellation, leave-rejected, leave-forfeited, employee-master-list, leave-utilized)
Get bundle report for all users
Get profile picture (type: all or personal)
Get holiday list from calendarific API
Get month year list by employee
